## Option A: Static File (Simplest)
Place the generated `llms.txt` file in your Vercel project's `public/` folder. Vercel will automatically serve it at `https://example.com/llms.txt`.

1. Download the `llms.txt` file from the Setup tab (you're on now)

3. Deploy to Vercel
4. Verify it's accessible at `https://example.com/llms.txt`

## Option B: Proxy Route (Recommended for Hosted Platforms)
Instead of a static file, proxy requests from your domain to FlowBlinq's hosted version. This keeps your llms.txt automatically updated when you re-run audits.

- Your domain `/llms.txt` → `https://geo.flowblinq.com/api/serve/{your-slug}/llms.txt`
- Your domain `/llms-full.txt` → `https://geo.flowblinq.com/api/serve/{your-slug}/llms-full.txt`

```php
<?php
if (!isset($_COOKIE['_geo_ref']) && !empty($_SERVER['HTTP_REFERER'])) {

        'expires'   => time() + 1800,
        'path'      => '/',
        'samesite'  => 'Strict',
        'secure'    => true,
        'httponly'  => false,
    ]);
}
?>
```

- `['_geo_ref']` → `$_COOKIE['_geo_ref']` (proper cookie array access)
